sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hashes (id UInt32, hash_value UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_hashes (id, hash_value) VALUES (1, intHash32(100)), (2, intHash32(200));
UPDATE test_hashes SET hash_value = intHash32(id * 10) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, hash_value FROM test_hashes WHERE hash_value = intHash32(100);
SELECT intHash32(SUM(id)) AS total_hash FROM test_hashes;
